chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3611 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ جَمِيلِ بْنِ دَرَّاجٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "مَا سَدَّ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَى مُؤْمِنٍ بَابَ رِزْقٍ إِلاَّ فَتَحَ اَللَّهُ لَهُ مَا هُوَ خَيْرٌ مِنْهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3611 - It is narrated from Jamil ibn Darraj, from Abu Abdullah (as):
"Allah (swt), the Almighty and Glorious, does not close a door of sustenance for a believer except that He opens for him what is better than it."
